shipPulse.label: Ship Pulse
shipPulse.policyBody: You have {days} days to add tracking or talk to the buyer. After that, explain any delay and request extra time — the buyer accepts or refuses. If they refuse (or don’t reply in 3 days), the order may be cancelled with refund.

fulfillment.noMessages: No messages yet — write to the buyer if you’re delayed.

fulfillment.rejected: Buyer refused the extension. Ship now or the order may be cancelled.
fulfillment.extensionIntro: Past the 10-day window: explain the delay and request extra days (buyer must accept).

about.metaDescription: Affisell connects verified suppliers, creator storefronts and buyers with transparent commissions and EU-grade compliance.
about.title: Commerce infrastructure for creators
about.description: Affisell is a creator-first marketplace: suppliers list wholesale catalog, affiliates launch branded storefronts in minutes, and buyers shop with full fee transparency.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.body: We believe creators should monetize their audience without holding inventory, managing warehouses, or guessing margins. Affisell orchestrates the full loop — catalog sync, checkout, supplier fulfillment, Stripe Connect payouts and GDPR-compliant trust signals.
mission.body2: Headquartered in Marseille, we ship EU-first with multi-currency checkout, variable commissions by category, and tooling like Swipe Feed, Agent sourcing and Pulse discovery.

0.title: Creator storefronts
0.body: Each affiliate gets a branded shop, custom listings, buyer rewards and drag-and-drop merchandising — live in under 2 minutes.

1.title: Supplier reach
1.body: Brands upload once, distribute through thousands of creator stores with automated order routing and real-time stock sync.

2.title: Transparent economics
2.body: Every order shows supplier wholesale, affiliate markup, platform fee and buyer price — no hidden deductions.

3.title: Trust by design
3.body: Legal hub, GDPR export/delete, cookie consent, invoice PDFs and commission explainers built into the product.

2024.title: Affisell founded
2024.body: Marketplace MVP: supplier catalog, affiliate storefronts and Stripe Connect split payouts.

2025a.title: Agent & Pulse
2025a.body: AI sourcing agent for affiliates, vertical discovery feed and supplier API integrations.

2025b.title: Settlement engine
2025b.body: Three-way split with category-level commission rates, HT-based platform fees and supplier transparency UI.

2026.title: Swipe Feed & GDPR stack
2026.body: One-gesture listing for affiliates, legal document hub, buyer/merchant GDPR dashboards and invoice generation.

blog.metaDescription: Updates on marketplace features, commission transparency and creator tooling from the Affisell team.
blog.title: Inside Affisell
blog.description: Product launches, marketplace economics and creator playbooks — written by the team building Affisell.

swipe-feed-affiliate-hub.title: Swipe Feed: list products in one gesture
swipe-feed-affiliate-hub.excerpt: Affiliates can now discover catalog SKUs Tinder-style, list at +30% markup on swipe right, and never see skipped products again.

sections.intro: Creator discovery used to mean endless grid scrolling. Swipe Feed turns affiliate sourcing into a focused, mobile-native flow — with undo, commission filters and a three-card preload stack.

s1.title: How it works
s1.body: Swipe right to publish a listing at your default markup (30% above supplier price). Swipe left to permanently hide a SKU from your feed. Every decision is stored so your feed stays fresh and relevant.

s2.title: Built for speed
s2.body: Framer Motion parallax, velocity-based commits and animation-first UX mean the card flies off-screen before the API call — so the interface feels instant even on slower networks.

s3.title: Try it
s3.body: Open the Affiliate Hub from your dashboard nav or go directly to /dashboard/affiliate/hub?mode=swipe. Combine with Agent sourcing for margin analysis on high-intent picks.

commission-transparency.title: Commission transparency on every order
commission-transparency.excerpt: Suppliers, affiliates and buyers now see exactly how wholesale, markup, platform fees and VAT split on each line.

sections.intro: Opaque marketplaces hide who earns what. Affisell exposes the full settlement breakdown on merchant order pages, buyer receipts and PDF invoices.

s1.title: Variable rates
s1.body: Commission cascades from category defaults to supplier profiles to individual SKUs — so high-margin categories can offer better affiliate economics without manual spreadsheets.

s2.title: Supplier clarity
s2.body: Supplier dashboards label deductions as partner commission and platform fee — not vague “adjustments”. Payout previews match what lands in Stripe Connect.

s3.title: CommissionExplainer
s3.body: Embedded UI on order detail pages walks each party through the math in plain language, with links to legal terms for affiliates and suppliers.

gdpr-marketplace-trust.title: GDPR hub for merchants and buyers
gdpr-marketplace-trust.excerpt: Export, delete, cookie preferences and legal consent versioning — native to Affisell accounts, not bolted-on PDFs.

sections.intro: Trust is a product feature. Affisell ships a full GDPR stack: signup consent capture, cookie banner with analytics gating, data export JSON and account deletion flows.

s1.title: Legal document hub
s1.body: Terms for buyers, suppliers and affiliates, privacy policy, refund rules and French mentions légales — all versioned and linked from signup and footer.

s2.title: Self-service rights
s2.body: Merchants and marketplace buyers access /dashboard/account/gdpr or /marketplace/account/gdpr to export their data or request deletion, subject to financial record retention.

s3.title: Why it matters
s3.body: Creator businesses operate across EU markets. Built-in compliance reduces legal risk and signals professionalism to brand partners evaluating your storefront.

creator-storefront-60s.title: Launch a creator storefront in 60 seconds
creator-storefront-60s.excerpt: Pick a supplier SKU, set your margin, publish — Affisell handles checkout, fulfillment notifications and weekly payouts.

sections.intro: Affisell removes the ops burden from creator commerce: no warehouse, no manual stock updates, no payment gateway setup from scratch.

s1.title: Catalog → storefront
s1.body: Browse the affiliate discovery catalog filtered by niche, commission or margin. Listing Builder lets you customize title, images, SEO slug and buyer cashback rewards.

s2.title: Your brand, our rails
s2.body: Custom domains, theme studio, featured collections and live store preview — while Stripe Connect routes supplier wholesale and your markup automatically.

s3.title: Start today
s3.body: Create a free affiliate account, connect payouts, and publish your first listing. Most creators see their first sale within the first week.

careers.metaDescription: Join the team building the creator-first marketplace — remote-friendly roles in engineering, creator success and supplier partnerships.
careers.title: Build the creator economy with us
careers.description: We're a small, product-obsessed team in Marseille (remote-friendly). Help us scale supplier catalog, affiliate tooling and buyer trust.

culture.title: How we work
culture.body: Affisell is early-stage with production traffic: you'll ship to real merchants weekly, own outcomes end-to-end, and talk directly to creators and suppliers.

careers.spontaneous: Don't see your role? Send a note with what you'd build at Affisell.

fullstack-engineer.title: Full-stack Engineer
fullstack-engineer.summary: Own marketplace features from Prisma schema to polished UI — checkout splits, affiliate tooling, supplier dashboards.

requirements.r2: Experience with payments or marketplaces is a plus
requirements.r3: Comfortable with Next.js App Router and server components

creator-success.title: Creator Success Manager
creator-success.summary: Onboard affiliates, improve listing quality, and feed product insights back to engineering.

requirements.r1: Fluent FR/EN; experience with creator or e-commerce communities
requirements.r2: Analytical — comfortable reading commission and conversion data
requirements.r3: Empathy for creators balancing audience trust and margins

supplier-partnerships.title: Supplier Partnerships (B2B)
supplier-partnerships.summary: Source brands, onboard catalog via API or bulk import, and co-design commission structures.

requirements.r1: Track record in marketplace, wholesale or D2C brand partnerships
requirements.r2: Understand unit economics: wholesale, markup, returns
requirements.r3: Willing to travel occasionally for supplier meetings in EU

press.metaDescription: Media resources, company facts and press contact for Affisell — the creator-first marketplace.
press.title: Press Kit
press.description: Facts, boilerplate and assets for journalists covering creator commerce, marketplace infrastructure and EU retail tech.

boilerplate.title: Boilerplate
boilerplate.short: Affisell is a creator-first marketplace connecting verified suppliers, affiliate storefronts and buyers — with transparent commissions and built-in EU compliance.
boilerplate.long: Founded in Marseille, Affisell lets creators launch branded shops in minutes without inventory. Suppliers distribute catalog through affiliate networks with automated fulfillment and Stripe Connect payouts. The platform includes AI sourcing tools, Swipe Feed discovery, Pulse vertical shopping, GDPR self-service and itemized commission breakdowns on every order.

compliance.label: Compliance
compliance.value: GDPR hub, versioned legal docs, invoice PDFs

contact.title: Media contact
